title: Spaghetti Alla Carbonara (Bacon Pasta)
ingredients: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
instructions: Heat a large pot of salted water.
Add spaghetti and cook until al dente.
In a large skillet, combine the chicken broth, garlic, butter, and bacon.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then turn to low simmer.
Add the sauce to the pasta, then stir in the egg yolks and Parmesan cheese.
